items.title: Castellanos released, admits to beer in dugout
items.description: The Philadelphia Phillies have released outfielder Nick Castellanos, making him a free agent who can sign with any club for the league minimum.

items.title: Agent: Sochan joining Knicks after Spurs release
items.description: Free agent forward Jeremy Sochan, who was released by the Spurs, plans to sign with the Knicks after he clears waivers, his agent told ESPN.
